---
title: "Monitoreo de Calidad del Aire (ICA)"
format: 
  dashboard:
    scrolling: true
    theme: lux
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: database
        href: https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/sociest/calidad-aire-monica/
        aria-label: Kaggle Dataset
        text: "Dataset"
---

```{ojs}
//| output: false
// Cargar datos
rawData = FileAttachment("data/consolidated/air_quality_consolidated.csv").csv({typed: true})

// Parsear fechas, calcular categorías y extraer métricas
data = rawData.map(d => {
  const dateObj = new Date(d.fecha_hora_registro);
  const ica = +d.valor_ica;
  const lat = +d.latitude;
  const lon = +d.longitude;
  
  let cat = "Desconocido";
  let color = "#999999";
  if (ica <= 50) { cat = "Buena"; color = "#00e400"; }
  else if (ica <= 100) { cat = "Moderada"; color = "#ffff00"; }
  else if (ica <= 150) { cat = "Dañina a Grupos Sensibles"; color = "#ff7e00"; }
  else if (ica <= 200) { cat = "Dañina a la Salud"; color = "#ff0000"; }
  else if (ica <= 300) { cat = "Muy Dañina"; color = "#8f3f97"; }
  else { cat = "Peligrosa"; color = "#7e0023"; }

  return {
    ...d,
    date: dateObj,
    hour: dateObj.getHours(),
    ica: ica,
    latitude: lat,
    longitude: lon,
    // Diferenciar lugares combinando el nombre con 3 dígitos de sus coordenadas
    lugar_nombre: `${d.lugar_nombre} [${lat.toFixed(3)}, ${lon.toFixed(3)}]`,
    categoria: cat,
    color: color
  };
}).filter(d => !isNaN(d.ica) && d.ica > 0 && d.ica <= 500 && !isNaN(d.latitude) && !isNaN(d.longitude))
  .sort((a, b) => d3.ascending(a.date, b.date));

lugares = Array.from(new Set(data.map(d => d.lugar_nombre))).sort()

minDateStr = d3.min(data, d => d.date).toISOString().split('T')[0]
maxDateStr = d3.max(data, d => d.date).toISOString().split('T')[0]
```

## Column {.sidebar}

**Filtros de Búsqueda**  
Utilice las siguientes opciones para explorar los datos.

<style>
  .sidebar form {
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem !important;
  }
  .sidebar input[type="date"], .sidebar select, .sidebar input[type="range"] {
    padding: 0.4rem 0.5rem !important;
    border-radius: 4px;
    height: 35px;
  }
</style>

---

```{ojs}
viewof selectedLugar = Inputs.select(["Todos"].concat(lugares), {label: "Ubicación:", value: "Todos"})
```

---

```{ojs}
viewof startDateStr = Inputs.date({label: "Desde:", value: minDateStr})
viewof endDateStr = Inputs.date({label: "Hasta:", value: maxDateStr})
```

---

```{ojs}
viewof startHour = Inputs.range([0, 23], {label: "Hora Mín.", step: 1, value: 0})
viewof endHour = Inputs.range([0, 23], {label: "Hora Máx.", step: 1, value: 23})
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false
// Lógica de filtrado
filteredData = data.filter(d => {
  const locMatch = selectedLugar === "Todos" || d.lugar_nombre === selectedLugar;
  const hourMatch = d.hour >= startHour && d.hour <= endHour;
  
  let dateMatch = true;
  if (startDateStr) {
    const sDate = new Date(startDateStr);
    dateMatch = dateMatch && (d.date >= sDate);
  }
  if (endDateStr) {
    const eDate = new Date(endDateStr);
    eDate.setHours(23, 59, 59);
    dateMatch = dateMatch && (d.date <= eDate);
  }
  
  return locMatch && hourMatch && dateMatch;
})

avgIca = filteredData.length ? d3.mean(filteredData, d => d.ica) : 0
maxIca = filteredData.length ? d3.max(filteredData, d => d.ica) : 0
```

## Column

### Row {height=20%}

```{ojs}
//| component: valuebox
//| title: Registros Filtrados
//| icon: list
//| color: secondary
filteredData.length
```

```{ojs}
//| component: valuebox
//| title: ICA Promedio
//| icon: activity
//| color: primary
Number(avgIca.toFixed(1))
```

```{ojs}
//| component: valuebox
//| title: ICA Máximo Crítico
//| icon: exclamation-triangle
//| color: danger
Number(maxIca.toFixed(1))
```

### Row {height=45%}

#### Column {width=60%}

```{ojs}
//| title: Mapa de Calor Interactivo (Promedio ICA)
//| padding: 0
mapData = Array.from(d3.rollup(filteredData, 
  v => ({
    lugar_nombre: v[0].lugar_nombre,
    latitude: v[0].latitude,
    longitude: v[0].longitude,
    ica: d3.mean(v, d => d.ica)
  }), 
  d => d.lugar_nombre
).values())

mapContainer = {
  const div = document.createElement("div");
  div.style.height = "100%";
  div.style.minHeight = "400px";
  div.style.width = "100%";
  div.style.borderRadius = "8px";
  div.style.zIndex = "1";
  
  const map = L.map(div).setView([-16.29, -63.58], 5);
  
  // Capa base de OpenStreetMap (estilo limpio)
  L.tileLayer("https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/light_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png", {
    attribution: "© OpenStreetMap contributors © CARTO"
  }).addTo(map);
  
  // Agregar marcadores para cada ciudad en el mapData
  mapData.forEach(d => {
    // Escala de colores estricta de ICA
    let color = "#00e400";
    if (d.ica > 300) color = "#7e0023";
    else if (d.ica > 200) color = "#8f3f97";
    else if (d.ica > 150) color = "#ff0000";
    else if (d.ica > 100) color = "#ff7e00";
    else if (d.ica > 50) color = "#ffff00";

    // Mancha de calor expansiva proporcional al ICA
    L.circleMarker([d.latitude, d.longitude], {
      radius: Math.min(50, Math.max(15, d.ica / 2)),
      fillColor: color,
      color: color,
      weight: 0,
      fillOpacity: 0.5
    }).bindTooltip("<b>" + d.lugar_nombre + "</b><br>ICA Promedio: " + d.ica.toFixed(1), {direction: "top"})
      .addTo(map);

    // Punto central geográfico exacto
    L.circleMarker([d.latitude, d.longitude], {
      radius: 4,
      fillColor: "#222",
      color: "white",
      weight: 1.5,
      fillOpacity: 1
    }).addTo(map);
  });
  
  // Limpieza vital de memoria para evitar "Map already initialized"
  invalidation.then(() => map.remove());
  
  return div;
}
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false
L = {
  const L = await require("leaflet@1.9.4");
  const link = document.createElement("link");
  link.rel = "stylesheet";
  link.href = "https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css";
  document.head.appendChild(link);
  return L;
}
```

#### Column {width=40%}

```{ojs}
//| title: Frecuencia de Niveles de Peligrosidad
Plot.plot({
  marginLeft: 150,
  x: { label: "Cantidad de Registros", grid: true },
  y: { label: null },
  color: {
    domain: ["Buena", "Moderada", "Dañina a Grupos Sensibles", "Dañina a la Salud", "Muy Dañina", "Peligrosa"],
    range: ["#00e400", "#ffff00", "#ff7e00", "#ff0000", "#8f3f97", "#7e0023"]
  },
  marks: [
    Plot.barX(filteredData, Plot.groupY({x: "count"}, {y: "categoria", fill: "categoria", sort: {y: "x", reverse: true}})),
    Plot.text(filteredData, Plot.groupY({x: "count", text: "count"}, {y: "categoria", textAnchor: "start", dx: 4, sort: {y: "x", reverse: true}}))
  ]
})
```

### Row {height=40%}

```{ojs}
//| title: Línea de Tiempo de Calidad del Aire (ICA)
Plot.plot({
  marginLeft: 50,
  y: { grid: true, label: "Valor ICA" },
  x: { label: "Fecha" },
  color: {
    domain: ["Buena", "Moderada", "Dañina a Grupos Sensibles", "Dañina a la Salud", "Muy Dañina", "Peligrosa"],
    range: ["#00e400", "#ffff00", "#ff7e00", "#ff0000", "#8f3f97", "#7e0023"]
  },
  marks: [
    Plot.ruleY([50, 100, 150, 200, 300], {strokeOpacity: 0.2, strokeDasharray: "2,2"}),
    Plot.dot(filteredData, {
      x: "date", 
      y: "ica", 
      fill: "categoria",
      title: d => `${d.lugar_nombre}\n${d.date.toLocaleString()}\nICA: ${d.ica}`
    }),
    Plot.lineY(filteredData, Plot.windowY({k: 14, reduce: "mean"}, {x: "date", y: "ica", stroke: "black", strokeOpacity: 0.5}))
  ]
})
```

### Row {height=35%}

```{ojs}
//| title: 🏆 Agradecimientos a Instituciones (Registros Aportados por Fuente)
Plot.plot({
  marginLeft: 280,
  x: { label: "Cantidad de Registros", grid: true },
  y: { label: null },
  color: { scheme: "Tableau10" },
  marks: [
    Plot.barX(filteredData, Plot.groupY({x: "count"}, {
      y: "fuente", 
      fill: "fuente", 
      sort: {y: "x", reverse: true}
    })),
    Plot.text(filteredData, Plot.groupY({x: "count", text: "count"}, {
      y: "fuente", 
      textAnchor: "start", 
      dx: 5, 
      sort: {y: "x", reverse: true}
    }))
  ]
})
```
